text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The long-awaited Arima Kinen is here. Kitasan
Black and Satono Diamond's dream of racing
together in a G1 race is on the cusp of becoming
reality.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black promises to lead Satono Diamond
across the finish line, while the latter promises to
finish one step ahead of her. Finally, their dream
race is about to begin!
